style_rules: Always verify monetary amounts against relevant exhibits
Explicitly flag any missing documentation, such as notarization
Include a dedicated section for flags and concerns in the case summary
Maintain consistency in formatting and section headings across all drafts
Include all relevant source citations for each section
Use a standard format for listing key parties and their roles
Ensure critical facts are supported by multiple sources when possible
Ensure critical facts are supported by multiple source citations
Maintain a consistent formatting style throughout the document
Include all relevant sources in the source citations for each section
Use a standard format for listing key parties, including title and company
List all key dates in chronological order
Explicitly state the cumulative value of suspicious transactions in the Critical Facts section
